emails.subject: FW: Posting LC's to Counterparties
emails.body: Should we address this one with Whalley?

emails.subject: RE: Posting LC's to Counterparties
emails.body: Are there lots more. If not, $2.5 million is not Whalley level discussion. Same point as we discussed this am. Rick

emails.subject: FW: Posting LC's to Counterparties
emails.body: Rick, This is consistent with all of his coal business. They have 5.5mm tonne short position which they will source with trades that require incremental collateral (capital). Bill
